domain: Cherokee blowgun (river-cane tube + hardwood dart with thistle-down piston fletching): single concentrated breath delivers single shot; piston seal converts single pulse into maximum force; no iterative spray.
specific_mechanism: Single-pulse propulsion: one breath, one piston-sealed dart, one shot — no continuous spray, no compressed reservoir, no repeat. Force depends on piston fit + single-breath consistency.
llm_application: BLOWGUN-DART one-pulse runtime repair: at inference time, when a runtime guardrail (schema validator / tool-call type-checker / hallucination detector) signals an error in an LLM output, perform a HARD ONE-PASS in-call repair. Take (offending_output, error_signal, fixed_repair_template), construct a single repair prefix, and re-decode ONCE within the same inference call. NO iterative retry loop. NO multi-step agentic plan. NO reflection chain. Exactly ONE corrective continuation. The hard one-pass constraint is a design primitive, not a degenerate case. Differs from (a) RepairAgent multi-step agentic localize-patch (multi-step), (b) Self-Refine (iterative critique), (c) Reflexion (memory + multi-loop), (d) SAN2PATCH (tree-structured multi-stage). Recombines (i) FIXED template prefix + (ii) ERROR-SIGNAL injection + (iii) HARD ONE-PASS no-loop constraint.
novelty_claim: Self-Refine iterates. Reflexion loops. RepairAgent multi-step. SAN2PATCH multi-stage. BLOWGUN-DART recombines (a) FIXED short repair template + (b) ERROR-SIGNAL injection + (c) HARD ONE-PASS NO-LOOP discipline. Three known components combined; the novelty is treating the one-pass constraint as primitive rather than a degenerate case.
